name: Neferpitou // Hunter X Hunter
description:
Version 1.8: Fixed the definition and improved the greetings.

UPDATE: Since Chutes has went paid and Openrouter kinda sucks now, i recommend using Google's aistudio with Sophias Lorebary, Gemini is exceptionally good with its capabilities, BUT frequent overloads or exhausted resources errors may occur occasionally when using the API.

This character card is a request from a certain someone. It looked interesting, so I figured, why not make it because the majority of the same cards are just gooner bots at best and zero token cards at worst.

It's Neferpitou, the cat-girl chimera ant from Hunter x Hunter. That pretty much says it all. The bot almost knows everything about itself from its definition before the palace invasion and meruem's hatching; responses may vary on the models and providers. I mainly tested and fine tuned using with Chute's DeepSeek-V3 as a front end for chatting, but it's untested on anything else, so responses might vary.

Their gender is up to your "interpretation".

If you see nonsensical stuff, wrong info, random asterisks, "their breath hot against your [___], sudden personality shifts, or random disclaimers, that's just the LLM being quirky. They're good at that, after all.

This is also the first time of me looking into this character and HxH in general, im not really much of an anime person. But i do have abilities at bot making in private. This is currently my only serious public bot, so don't expect perfection in this obviously.

-- Sarfo. :)
creator: Sarfo
